description: Style Notefabindia's jewellery references the eras gone by and are reworked to blend in with your season outfits. Whoever told you ethnic jewellery can't be worn with your fashion favourites were wrong! This statement piece from Fabindia is a jewellery box essential that will make an interesting addition to your simple ensembles. Having a piece likes this adds an interesting dimension to a monochrome outfit or an ensemble dominated by neutral hues.Product DetailsSilver pendant with a Columbian emerald coloured centre stone, flanked by smaller pearly beadsA loop for a chain to go throughMaterial and CareSilverWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeWidth: 2.5 cm (approximate)
